tool_input.args: Mission: benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-22-fable5-tail-full/tail-config-spec-drift-mission.md に設定ドリフト監査 artifact を作成。入力は fixture 4 ファイル（spec.md / impl-alpha.md / impl-beta.md / runbook.md、読了済み）。validator 要件: confirmed-drift table / rejected-candidates（換算提示）/ violated spec constraints 明示 / 見出し 8 種。制約: benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/ 配下は fixture 4 + 出力のみアクセス可、commit/push/network 禁止。Complexity: Complex, max_iter 3, threshold 4.0

tool_input.command:
SP=/private/tmp/claude-501/-private-tmp-mission-vs-official-goal-tail-config-spec-drift-mission-repo/f8a3209c-58f8-4e43-b3a9-9a224b98d6ac/scratchpad && python3 - <<'PY' && python3 scripts/mission-state.py aggregate-reviews --iteration 2 --input "$SP/review-verify-2.json" --out "$SP/mission-scorer-2.json" --json && python3 scripts/mission-state.py push-score --iteration 2 --scoring-json "$SP/mission-scorer-2.json"
import json
p="/private/tmp/claude-501/-private-tmp-mission-vs-official-goal-tail-config-spec-drift-mission-repo/f8a3209c-58f8-4e43-b3a9-9a224b98d6ac/scratchpad/review-verify-2.json"
d=json.load(open(p))
d["findings"][0]["id"]="verify-1"
json.dump(d,open(p,"w"),ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
print("id normalized to verify-1 (schema requirement; content unchanged)")
PY
tool_input.description: Normalize finding id prefix, aggregate and push iteration 2 score

tool_input.command: SP=/private/tmp/claude-501/-private-tmp-mission-vs-official-goal-tail-config-spec-drift-mission-repo/f8a3209c-58f8-4e43-b3a9-9a224b98d6ac/scratchpad && python3 scripts/mission-state.py aggregate-reviews --iteration 2 --input "$SP/review-verify-2.json" --out "$SP/mission-scorer-2.json" --json | head -3 && python3 scripts/mission-state.py push-score --iteration 2 --scoring-json "$SP/mission-scorer-2.json" | head -2 && python3 scripts/mission-state.py mark-passes && python3 scripts/mission-state.py next
tool_input.description: Aggregate iteration 2, push score, mark-passes, next
